=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan 
An Open Tent 
Endicott College 
Beverly, Massachusetts 
30 October 1992 

Unknown rec.
Great sound

DISK 1
1. I Can't Be Satisfied (McKinley Morganfield) 
2. Dear Landlord 
3. All Along The Watchtower 
4. Positively 4th Street 
5. Shelter From The Storm 
6. She Belongs To Me 
7. Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter) 
8. Mama, You Been On My Mind 
9. Boots Of Spanish Leather 

DISK 2 
1. Mr. Tambourine Man 
2. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right 
3. Unbelievable 
4. When I Paint My Masterpiece 
5. The Times They Are A-Changin' 
6. Maggie's Farm 
7. What Good Am I? 
8. Highway 61 Revisited 
9. It Ain't Me, Babe 


Concert # 446 of The Never-Ending Tour. 
Concert # 10 of the 1992 US Fall Tour. 1992 concert # 82. 

Concert # 15 with the 8th Never-Ending Tour band: 
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar) 
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar) 
John Jackson (guitar) 
Tony Garnier (bass) 
Ian Wallace (drums) 
Winston Watson (drums & percussion). 

8-10, 18 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal). 
11 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal) & Tony Garnier (bass). 
14 acoustic with the band. 
3, 5, 8-11, 18 Bob Dylan harmonica. 
14 Bucky Baxter (mandolin 


5 new songs (27%) compared to previous concert. 
No new songs for this tour. 
Stereo audience recording, 115 minutes. 
Session info updated 28 March 1993.
